title: Lungi Dance Lyrics Chennai Express
stanzas:
Lungi Dance Lyrics From Chennai Express.

this is the tribute to thalaivar
from king khan
and one and only
yo yo honey singh!

moochhon ko thoda round ghumake
anna ke jaisa chashma lagake
coconut me lassi milake
aa jaao sare mood banake (x2)

all the rajini fans – thalaivar
don’t miss the chance – thalaivar
all the rajini fans – thalaivar
don’t miss the chance – do this!

jado jawaani bada jor si ve jaalma
main taa rajini da fan si ve jaalma (x2)

disco me jab ye gana bajega
on the floor aana padega
lungi ko uthana padega
step karke dikhana padega (x2)

all the rajini fans – thalaivar
don’t miss the chance – thalaivar
all the rajini fans – thalaivar
don’t miss the chance – do this

night club mai aaya, mai toh
mujhko rokega kon aur kaiko
maira mood mai dance karega
kisika daddy sai ni darega

jisko jo bi hai wo karna wo kar lo
idhar hi hoon mai khada pakad lo
ghar pe jaake tum google kar lo
mere bare me wikipedia pe padh lo

lungi dance, lungi dance…

kon mujhsa hai kon
oh baby yes i am a don
nahi milega mujhsa go find it!
don’t angry me, mind it!

arey mere jaise dance kisko aata hai
choreographer ko mai hi sikhata hai
woh ghar pe aata hai
mujhse seekh ke jaata hai
mujhse seekh ke woh logo ko sikhata hai

lungi dance, lungi dance…

moochhon ko thoda round ghumake
anna ke jaisa chashma lagake
coconut me lassi milake
aa jaao sare mood banake (x2)

all the rajini fans – thalaivar
don’t miss the chance – thalaivar
all the rajini fans – thalaivar
don’t miss the chance – do this!

lungi dance, lungi dance…

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Lungi Dance'?

'Lungi Dance' is a tribute to the legendary actor Rajinikanth, celebrating his iconic style and charisma through a fun and energetic dance number.

How does 'Lungi Dance' fit into the plot of Chennai Express?

The song is a lively moment in Chennai Express, showcasing the carefree and festive spirit of the characters as they embrace the joy of life.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Lungi Dance'?

The song is sung and composed by Yo Yo Honey Singh, known for his catchy beats and engaging lyrics.

When was 'Lungi Dance' released?

'Lungi Dance' was released on July 1, 2013, as part of the soundtrack for Chennai Express.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Lungi Dance' is a high-energy dance number that captures the essence of celebration and joy in the movie Chennai Express. The song pays homage to the legendary Rajinikanth, inviting fans to join in the fun with its catchy beats and playful lyrics. It evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect fit for parties and celebrations. With Yo Yo Honey Singh's vibrant vocals, this track is sure to get everyone dancing and enjoying the moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Lungi Dance from Chennai Express is a vibrant tribute that perfectly blends the charisma of Rajinikanth with the energetic beats of Yo Yo Honey Singh. This catchy dance number is sure to get everyone on their feet, celebrating the spirit of fun and festivity. Experience the electrifying vibe that makes this song a must-play at every party!
stanzaMeanings: This is the tribute to the superstar from King Khan and the one and only Yo Yo Honey Singh!
Twist your mustache a bit, wear glasses like Anna, mix coconut with lassi, and come with the right mood.
All the Rajini fans – superstar, don’t miss the chance – superstar, all the Rajini fans – superstar, don’t miss the chance – do this!
When I was young, I was a big fan of Rajini.
When this song plays in the disco, you have to come on the floor, lift your lungi, and show your moves.
All the Rajini fans – superstar, don’t miss the chance – superstar, all the Rajini fans – superstar, don’t miss the chance – do this.

I came to the nightclub, who can stop me? Why would anyone dance in my mood? No one dares to stop me. Do whatever you want, I’m right here, you can Google me later, read about me on Wikipedia. Lungi dance, lungi dance…
Who is like me? Oh baby, yes, I am a don. You won’t find anyone like me, go look for it! Don’t make me angry, remember that!
Who else can dance like me? I teach the choreographer. He comes to my place, learns from me, and then teaches others. Lungi dance, lungi dance…
Twist your mustache a bit, wear glasses like Anna, mix coconut with lassi, and come with the right mood.
All the Rajini fans – superstar, don’t miss the chance – superstar, all the Rajini fans – superstar, don’t miss the chance – do this! Lungi dance, lungi dance…
